title: FBI launches inquiry into Steam games spreading malware

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — FBI launches inquiry into Steam games spreading malware
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX

    condition: selection_dns
level: high
